_comment_script_keys: Add more entries here for extra deployments/accounts, e.g. {"id":"AKfycb...","account":"acct-b"}. Deployments with the same account label share one Apps Script daily quota bucket.
_comment_socks_auth: Optional: require SOCKS5 username/password (RFC 1929). Both fields must be set together or both omitted.
_comment_coalesce: Optional adaptive uplink coalescing. Enabled by default (step=25, max=50). Set coalesce_step_ms to -1 to disable. Set coalesce_max_ms higher to allow longer bursts to coalesce.
_comment_idle_slots: Optional download-throughput tuning. Default 2 (best balance for accounts with 2+ deployments). Lower to 1 if each account has only one deployment. Max 3. Omitting the field is equivalent to 2.
